rules: Read the Host-published current or library snapshot before drafting.
Read the core-generated schema/template for the selected domain; never infer a field whitelist from this strategy.
Do not invent an effect type when the schema or template does not support it.
Treat passive, conditional, and countable classifications as semantic choices supported by evidence; stack-count heuristics are review strategy, not protocol.
Preserve level-specific values instead of repeating a maximum-level value across every level.
Run fill_validate before proposal_create and attach concise source evidence.
After a real user saves in the Electron Host, reread the next Host snapshot instead of assuming the write succeeded.
